notableEvents.label: Rafael Marchán GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Marchán grounds into a double play, third baseman Javier Sanoja to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Christopher Morel. Justin Crawford out at 2nd. Rafael Marchán out at 1st.
